[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101 3
1 0100100 2
2 0111111 6
3 0000101 2
4 1110111 6
5 1000101 3
6 1010101 4
7 1000000 1

01 0000000 a

23 0000000 a

45 0001000 1

70 0011000 2

71 0000000 a
